children.name: Kewana

core_wounds: feeling like a financial failure at 38

health_mental_physical: stress high, recent weight gain, historically very fit, knows gym = mental salvation

non_negotiable_goals: house with room for Kewana by Dec 2027 latest (sooner if possible)
switch income from body-breaking labor to brain/AI/trading/music
enjoy life, give kids what he never had
